parameters.name: xcoord
parameters.label: X Coordinate
parameters.description: The channel name for the movement of the pen in the x direction.

parameters.name: ycoord
parameters.label: Y Coordinate
parameters.description: The channel name for the movement of the pen in the y direction.

parameters.name: pressure
parameters.label: Pressure
parameters.description: The channel name for the pressure reported by the pen.

parameters.name: xtilt
parameters.label: X Tilt
parameters.description: The channel name for the tilt of the pen in the x direction.

parameters.name: ytilt
parameters.label: Y Tilt
parameters.description: The channel name for the tilt of the pen in the y direction.

parameters.name: tanpressure
parameters.label: Finger Wheel
parameters.description: The channel name for a finger rollar wheel if available.

parameters.name: zcoord
parameters.label: Thumb Wheel
parameters.description: The channel name for a thumb rollar wheel if available.

parameters.name: rotation
parameters.label: Rotation
parameters.description: The channel name for the rotation the pen is reporting.

parameters.name: button1
parameters.label: Button 1
parameters.description: The channel name for the button reported as Button 1.

parameters.name: button2
parameters.label: Button 2
parameters.description: The channel name for the button reported as Button 2.

parameters.name: button3
parameters.label: Button 3
parameters.description: The channel name for the button reported as Button 3.

parameters.name: button4
parameters.label: Button 4
parameters.description: The channel name for the button reported as Button 4.

parameters.name: button5
parameters.label: Button 5
parameters.description: The channel name for the button reported as Button 5.

parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While , the pen movement will be output from and the will cook every frame. When set to it will not cook and the values will not be updated. will capture pen events only when the is playing forward.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the channels, in samples per second.

parameters.name: left
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: The left extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: right
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: The right extend conditions (before/after range).

parameters.name: defval
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: The value used for the Default Value extend condition.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
